## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] **CHANGELOG.md has been updated** ← _This is mandatory. Your PR will be blocked without it._
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npx playwright test`)
- [ ] No hardcoded sleeps (`page.waitForTimeout`) added
- [ ] Selectors are stable (no dynamic IDs, style hooks, or position-based selectors)
- [ ] Assertions reflect real business behavior (not just element existence)
- [ ] No `console.log` or debug artifacts left in code
